name: Diabetic and Low Sodium Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan.
3. Cream the vegetable shortening until smooth.
4. Gradually add sugar and continue creaming well.
5. Add the eggs one at a time, creaming thoroughly after each addition.
6. Stir in lemon juice and vanilla extract.
7. Sift cake flour into the mixture and combine.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared tube pan.
9. Bake for 1 1/2 hours or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Makes 1 large cake (20 slices). Omit lemon juice and add 1/4 teaspoon freshly grated nutmeg to the sifted flour instead.
